title: Luffy Breaks Through Krieg’s Arsenal — Part 4
scene: On pages 15–18, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy keeps pushing Don Krieg backward, proving that Krieg’s weapons cannot fully stop him.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I ain't done with you yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: After angering me to this extent, there won't even be any of your remains after I'm through with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: heh heh... have you finally realized that the strongest man in the world,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-Wha!? My great war spear is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 'Cause now that I'm on this wide open space, I'll send you flying!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
